examples: Drier and more potent than anisette, this semi-sweet anise liqueur is made in Greece and Cyprus.
Moved to scream, Marianela poured the little gentleman sweet anisette, which she kept under her pillow for extremely special occasions, and before long, he was dazed and stammering.
Wash the inside of an Old Fashioned glass with anisette liqueur. then fill it with ice.
Some girlfriends and I finished off lunch with anisette.
